'''''Furious''''' was a [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] that, along with several [[Viraxo]] ships, including the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Blast Radius]]'' took part in the capture of [[Twin Suns Station (space station)|Twin Sun Station]]. This attack was timed as the station's personnel were evacuating the station due to a warning from [[Antan Azzameen]]. [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]] were present as well. Ace, in the ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'', was picking up a container of [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]], while Aeron was getting to the safe to collect some valuables there. By the time the two escaped with what they wanted, the ''Furious'' had managed to capture the station.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
